rulings.Case Title: BETTY PETERSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Defendant Monterey Mechanical Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, To Produce Documents, And To Extend The Close Of Discovery With Respect To Monterey Mechanical
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, February 2, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1, PLAINTIFFS BETTY PETERSON, PHILIP PETERSON, JR., DENISE WILLIAMS, LORI PETERSON Motion To Compel Defendant Monterey Mechanical Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, To Produce Documents, And To Extend The Close Of Discovery With Respect To Monterey Mechanical IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY. = (503/TLJ)
